item.name: Pitch Pickle
item.description:
Biting into the flesh of this wavekin will stain one's entire mouth black, which is useful if you have occasion to disguise yourself as ancient Far Eastern nobility.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: This rare species of sea pickle was a favorite of Hingan nobility in generations past. As was the fashion at the time, they preferred to dye their teeth black, and a single pitch pickle was a swift means to a stygian smile.
